prompt: Create a neon-soaked cyberpunk restaurant website with glitching text effects, holographic menu items, purple and cyan gradients, floating food imagery, and a reservation system that looks like a terminal interface
prompt_refined: Generate a digital screenshot of a neon-soaked cyberpunk restaurant website interface. The design features prominent purple and cyan gradients throughout the background and UI elements. Holographic 3D projections of futuristic food and drink items (e.g., glowing synth-sushi, iridescent cocktails) float freely as the main menu display. Text elements, especially headings and menu descriptions, exhibit dynamic glitching effects. A dedicated section, resembling a retro-futuristic terminal interface with green monospaced text and a blinking cursor, is visible on the right side of the screen, serving as the reservation system.
objects: Purple and cyan gradient UI elements
Holographic 3D projections of futuristic food and drink
Text elements with dynamic glitching effects
Retro-futuristic terminal interface on the right side of the screen
Green monospaced text within the terminal
